slides.headline: Jamie gets nearly every job through Instagram DMs.
slides.body: Great problem to have. Until it wasn't. Swipe.

slides.headline: Half were tyre-kickers.
slides.body: And the real ones went cold before he could reply — he's an electrician, not a typist.

slides.headline: We put a speed-to-lead system on his Instagram.
slides.body: Every DM gets an instant reply — it qualifies the job and weeds out the time-wasters.

slides.label: to reply — not hours. The good leads don't go cold anymore.

slides.headline: The serious ones get booked automatically.
slides.body: Jamie spends his evenings on the tools, not buried in his inbox.

slides.headline: Drowning in DMs and missing the good ones?
slides.save: Save this if your inbox is the bottleneck
